_comment: Single source of truth for wire/state enum codes that BOTH TypeScript and Rust must agree on byte-for-byte. TypeScript imports this file directly; Rust generates constants from it via rts-sim-wasm/build.rs. One file, two consumers, zero drift. Only enums that genuinely cross the JS/WASM boundary live here — TS-only enums (action/projectile/resource codes) stay in their TS modules.
